The plant is also known as Mexican parsley due to its parsley-like appearance and growth habit. Further classification places Donnellsmithia peucedanoides within the order Apiales and the clade Eurosids I. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between Donnellsmithia peucedanoides and other plants in its family.
